productDisplayName: Arrow Sport Men Blue & White Check Shirt
description: Style Note The addition of refined details in this formal staple elevates this cotton shirt above the ordinary. Incorporating this season's hottest trends from the runway into your wardrobe, this shirt tops our officewear wish list! Style it with pale chinos and understated, tonal accessories. Product Details Blue and white checked shirt, has short sleeves, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest and a straight hem Material and Care 100% cotton Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using mild detergent Do not wring, scrub or bleach Tumble dry low Medium steam iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regual sport fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18') is wearing a size 42
